title: Criminal Minds
description: A 14 season show replicating or slightly altering real crimes.
label: interview

title: Love Island
description: Candidates both women and men are put on an island to find love. They are placed into initial couples and can explore other connections. Every few episodes someone gets voted off by the audience or the other islanders.
label: interview

title: Avatar The Last Airbender
description: An avatar who was frozen for many years is trying to bring all the nations together. Each nation has people with different elemental powers.

title: Kung Fu Panda
description: A fighting panda and his team work together to keep peace and protect their valley.
label: interview

title: The Office
description: A comedy series following the daily lives of office employees and their unusual manager.

title: Minecraft
description: Players gather resources, build structures, and survive in a world made entirely of blocks.
label: solo

title: The Legend of Zelda
description: A young hero travels across a kingdom to defeat evil forces and rescue the princess.
label: solo

title: Stranger Things
description: A group of friends uncover supernatural events connected to a secret government experiment.

title: Finding Nemo
description: A clownfish travels across the ocean searching for his son who was captured by divers.

title: Jurassic Park
description: Scientists create a park filled with cloned dinosaurs, but the creatures eventually escape control.

title: Friends
description: Six friends navigate relationships, careers, and everyday life while living in New York City.
label: panel

title: The Avengers
description: A team of superheroes join forces to protect the world from powerful threats.
label: panel

title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
description: Detectives in a New York police precinct solve crimes while dealing with workplace humor.
label: panel

title: Shrek
description: An ogre goes on a journey to rescue a princess and discovers unexpected friendships.

title: Spider-Man
description: A teenager gains spider-like abilities and balances superhero duties with everyday life.

title: Harry Potter
description: A young wizard attends a magical school while confronting the dark wizard who threatens the wizarding world.
label: narrative

title: Frozen
description: Two sisters learn the value of family while one struggles to control her magical ice powers.

title: The Lord of the Rings
description: A group of companions embark on a quest to destroy a powerful ring and save their world.
label: narrative

title: Toy Story
description: A collection of toys come to life when humans are not around and go on adventures together.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince must reclaim his kingdom after the death of his father.
